productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Pink Minnie With Green Lace Kidswear
description: CompositionPink top with flayed sleeves, white and green polka dot piping along the neckline and similar colour hem frills, coupled with a large Minnie graphic print on the frontWash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsPretty perfect - that's what your little girl will look like in this pink top from disney. The flayed sleeves add a complete feminine touch to this top, while the cheerful Minnie Mouse graphic splayed across the front adds happy energy to the outfit. To add on, the green and white polka dotted frills along the hem make the top all the more stylish. The cotton fabric will keep her dry and well ventilated while you can make her look all the more stylish by teaming this top with denim shorts or skirts and a pair of pretty footwear from crocs, which is now available at myntra. Add on some colourful jibbitz to these crocs sandals to transform your little girl into a princess.
